---
title: Quick start
---

To gain a access to iThenticate you can contact your [Key-User](key_users.qmd) of your faculty. Your faculty's Key-user is able to request an account for you. 

Once an [account](cost_access.qmd) is created for you, you will receive an email from Turnitin. You can start [logging in](log_in.qmd) and conduct [your first scan](first_scan.qmd). 

iThenticate allows you to [save, share and export](tools/ithenticate/exporting_results.qmd) your results to discuss and [interpert](similarity_scores.qmd) your resuls with your supervisor. 

You can also choose to adjust your similarity check or run a [doc-to-doc](doc_to_doc_comparison.qmd) comparison. For this you can navigate to the Advanced Settings file under Documentation.
